headline: SEC Targets Crypto in 2026 Regulatory Crackdown

article.title: SEC crypto rule changes are high on its 2026 agenda
article.summary: The financial regulator’s agenda included proposed rule changes related to crypto broker-dealers, digital assets on national securities exchanges and potential safe harbors.

headline: Ether Surges Toward $2K on Bitmine Buying Spree

article.title: Ether climbs toward $2K as Bitmine buys ETH, Robinhood L2 boost
article.summary: ETH charts a path toward $2,000 as TradFi adoption, DAT buying and a long-awaited network upgrade boost investor interest.

headline: Crude Spikes 10% on US Iran Oil Blockade

article.title: US Strikes Iran and Blocks Oil Sales in New Threats to Ceasefire
article.summary: The US launched fresh airstrikes in Iran and revoked a waiver that allowed it to sell oil globally, further imperiling a peace agreement after a series of attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Turkey Teeters on Brink of Frontier Market Demotion

article.title: S&P Dow Jones Warns of Potential Frontier-Market Cut for Turkey
article.summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices put Turkey on a watchlist for a potential cut to frontier-market status, joining MSCI Inc. in warning of downgrades.

headline: Bitcoin Deposits Surge 100% Via Lightning Network

article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Polymarket Turns On Instant Bitcoin Deposits Via Lightning Network, Powered by Spark
Polymarket has enabled instant self-custodial Bitcoin deposits via the Lightning Network using Spark.

headline: Kraken Wins $22M Judgment Against Former Auditor

article.title: Kraken Seeks Final Judgment After $22 Million Award Against Former Auditor
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Kraken Seeks Final Judgment After $22 Million Award Against Former Auditor
Kraken is seeking a final Delaware court judgment against former auditor Mazars after winning a $22 million arbitration award, arguing the firm's abrupt resignation during heightened U.S. regulatory pressure

headline: Anthropic Scraps Claude Tracker Amid $1B Crypto Privacy Fallout

article.title: Anthropic Removes Hidden Claude Code Tracker After Researchers Raise Privacy Concerns
article.summary: The company says the tool was designed to stop abuse and AI model extraction, but critics questioned the use of undisclosed monitoring.

headline: SEC Unveils Crypto Safe Harbor This Month

article.title: SEC's Long-Promised Crypto Safe Harbor to Be Introduced as Soon as This Month
article.summary: The SEC updated its agenda to indicate that a key crypto rulemaking is slated to be released for public comment in July.

article.title: Kraken wins $22 million arbitration against auditor Mazars for ditching the firm during Operation Choke Point 2.0
article.summary: Payward sued its former auditor, Mazars, for abandoning a nearly complete audit during Operation Choke Point 2.0.

article.title: CFTC charges North Carolina man over alleged $14 million crypto, futures fraud
article.summary: The CFTC charged a NC man and his company after the agency said he swindled about 60 people out of $14 million in a commodity pool.

headline: Oil Surges 5% on US Iran Strike Escalation

article.title: US launches new wave of Iran strikes after attacks on tankers
article.summary: Trump administration also revokes licence allowing Islamic republic’s oil sales, sending crude prices higher

headline: Oil Surges 5% on Iran Waiver Revocation
